worker.generalist: Search all eight registered mechanisms and prefer the simplest full-prefix explanation.
worker.differences: Pay special attention to finite differences, periodic differences, and lagged polynomial increments.
worker.recurrences: Pay special attention to affine and second-order recurrences, including periodic phases.
worker.streams: Pay special attention to interleaved streams, lagged subsequences, and growing blocks.
worker.modular: Actively test modular affine structure and real wrap points, while rejecting forced modular stories.
worker.simplicity: Prefer the shortest allowed complete mechanism and reject clever partial fits.
worker.diversifier: Actively seek a materially different allowed mechanism from the current leading explanation.
worker.audit: Prioritize exact replay of the visible prefix and reliable arithmetic before extrapolation.

judge.plurality_preserving: Use proposal plurality as the default. Override it only when later evidence identifies a concrete full-prefix or arithmetic failure and supports a complete alternative.
judge.evidence_weighted: Select the answer backed by the clearest complete mechanism and independent checks. Popularity and confidence are secondary evidence.
judge.minority_aware: Compare the plurality with the strongest coherent minority. Change the plurality only when the minority has decisively better full-prefix support.
judge.robustness_first: Choose the answer that survives the most independent falsification and verification. Avoid novel alternatives that were not fully reconstructed.
